name: Devil Fruit: Gomu Gomu no Mi (Example)

description.value:
Archetype Artifact — Devil Fruit (Paramecia)

A round, bumpy fruit with a swirling pattern. Consuming it permanently transforms the user's body into rubber, granting the Rubber-Human archetype.

Passive: Your body becomes rubber. You are immune to electricity damage and gain resistance 5 to bludgeoning damage. Your unarmed Strikes deal bludgeoning damage and have the nonlethal and reach traits (range 10 feet).

Activate [one-action] (concentrate) — You stretch a limb to deliver a melee Strike at up to 20 feet.

Trait: Sea-Bound. While submerged in standing seawater (at least waist-deep) or in contact with Seastone, you are Slowed 1, Clumsy 1, and cannot use any actions or passives granted by your Devil Fruit archetype. If fully submerged, you are Stunned until removed from the water.

A creature may only ever consume one Devil Fruit. Consuming a second is instantly fatal.
description.gm: This is a placeholder for a Paramecia-type fruit. Expand the rules array with your campaign's full feat chain and rule elements. The rubber body immunity/resistance is listed in description only — add REs as needed.
